info.title: Graph Meeting Transcripts
info.description: Microsoft Graph connector for Teams meeting transcripts, recordings, attendance, AI insights, and virtual events (webinars, town halls, sessions, presenters, registrations).

post.description: Sends JSON-RPC requests to invoke Microsoft Graph meeting tools via MCP for Copilot Studio integration.

get.summary: Get My Online Meeting by Join URL
get.description: Retrieve an online meeting by its join URL. Use this to find the meeting ID needed for transcript operations.

post.description: Create an online meeting on behalf of the signed-in user. The meeting does not appear on the user's calendar.

get.description: Retrieve the list of transcripts associated with my online meeting.
Retrieve a specific transcript associated with my online meeting.
Retrieve the VTT content of a specific transcript from my online meeting.
Retrieve the time-aligned metadata of utterances in a transcript from my online meeting, including speaker names, spoken text, and language.

200.description: Transcript metadata content in VTT format with JSON utterance data

get.description: Retrieve the list of transcripts associated with a specific user's online meeting.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID or email address

get.description: Retrieve a specific transcript associated with a user's online meeting.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID or email address

get.description: Retrieve the VTT content of a specific transcript from a user's online meeting.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID or email address

get.description: Retrieve the time-aligned metadata of utterances in a transcript from a user's online meeting.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID or email address

200.description: Transcript metadata content in VTT format with JSON utterance data

get.description: Get all transcripts from online meetings organized by the specified user. Supports filtering by organizer, start/end date.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID of the meeting organizer

parameters.name: meetingOrganizerUserId
parameters.description: The user ID of the meeting organizer (required function parameter)

parameters.name: startDateTime
parameters.description: Filter for transcripts created after this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: endDateTime
parameters.description: Filter for transcripts created before this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Max number of transcripts per page

200.description: List of transcripts across all meetings

get.description: Retrieve the list of recordings associated with my online meeting.
Retrieve metadata for a specific recording associated with my online meeting.
Retrieve the video content (MP4) of a specific recording from my online meeting.

200.description: Recording content as MP4 video stream

get.description: Retrieve the list of recordings associated with a specific user's online meeting.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID or email address

get.description: Retrieve metadata for a specific recording associated with a user's online meeting.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID or email address

get.description: Retrieve the video content (MP4) of a specific recording from a user's online meeting.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID or email address

200.description: Recording content as MP4 video stream

get.description: Get all recordings from online meetings organized by the specified user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID of the meeting organizer

parameters.name: meetingOrganizerUserId
parameters.description: The user ID of the meeting organizer (required function parameter)

parameters.name: startDateTime
parameters.description: Filter for recordings created after this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: endDateTime
parameters.description: Filter for recordings created before this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Max number of recordings per page

200.description: List of recordings across all meetings

get.description: Retrieve the list of attendance reports for my online meeting.
Retrieve a specific attendance report with attendance records for my online meeting. Use $expand=attendanceRecords to include individual records.
Retrieve the list of attendance reports for a specific user's online meeting.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID or email address

get.description: Retrieve a specific attendance report with attendance records for a user's online meeting. Use $expand=attendanceRecords to include individual records.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID or email address

get.description: Retrieve AI-generated insights (summaries, action items, mentions) for an online meeting. Requires Microsoft 365 Copilot license.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID of the meeting participant (must have Copilot license)

get.description: Retrieve a specific AI-generated insight with detailed meeting notes, action items, and participant mentions. Requires Microsoft 365 Copilot license.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID of the meeting participant (must have Copilot license)

200.description: AI insight details with meeting notes, action items, and mentions

get.description: Retrieve properties and relationships of an online meeting by its ID.

patch.description: Update the properties of an online meeting (e.g., subject, start/end time, settings).

delete.description: Delete an online meeting. The meeting is removed and can no longer be joined.

post.description: Create an online meeting with a custom external ID. If the meeting already exists, retrieve its properties instead of creating a duplicate.

get.description: Retrieve the list of individual attendance records for a specific attendance report from my online meeting.
Retrieve the list of individual attendance records for a specific attendance report from a user's online meeting.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID or email address

get.description: Get newly created or updated transcripts without having to perform a full read of the entire collection. Use for incremental sync of meeting transcripts.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID of the meeting organizer

parameters.name: $deltatoken
parameters.description: Opaque delta token from a previous delta response

parameters.name: $skiptoken
parameters.description: Opaque skip token for pagination within delta results

get.description: Get newly created or updated recordings without having to perform a full read of the entire collection. Use for incremental sync of meeting recordings.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID of the meeting organizer

parameters.name: $deltatoken
parameters.description: Opaque delta token from a previous delta response

parameters.name: $skiptoken
parameters.description: Opaque skip token for pagination within delta results

get.summary: Get User Online Meeting by Join URL
get.description: Retrieve a user's online meeting by its join URL. Requires application permissions.

post.description: Create an online meeting on behalf of a specified user.

get.description: Retrieve the properties of a user's online meeting by meeting ID.

parameters.name: meetingId
parameters.description: The ID of the online meeting.

patch.description: Update the properties of a user's online meeting.

parameters.name: meetingId
parameters.description: The ID of the online meeting.

parameters.name: meetingId
parameters.description: The ID of the online meeting.

post.summary: Create or Get User Online Meeting
post.description: Create an online meeting with a custom external ID for a user. If the external ID already exists, returns the existing meeting.

get.description: Get the list of all webinars created in the tenant.

post.description: Create a new Teams webinar. The webinar is created in draft status; use Publish Webinar to make it visible.

get.description: Read the properties and relationships of a webinar.

patch.description: Update the properties of a webinar. Only the organizer and co-organizer can update.

post.description: Publish a draft webinar to make it visible to its audience.
Cancel a webinar. Sets the webinar's status to canceled permanently.

get.description: Get webinars where the signed-in user has the specified role (organizer, coOrganizer, presenter, attendee).

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: User role filter (organizer, coOrganizer, presenter, attendee).

get.summary: List Webinars by User ID and Role
get.description: Get webinars where the specified user has the given role.

parameters.name: fnUserId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to filter by.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: User role filter (organizer, coOrganizer, presenter, attendee).

get.description: Get the list of all town halls created in the tenant.

post.description: Create a new Teams town hall. The town hall is created in draft status; use Publish Town Hall to make it visible.

get.description: Read the properties and relationships of a town hall.

parameters.name: townhallId
parameters.description: The ID of the town hall.

patch.description: Update the properties of a town hall. Only the organizer and co-organizer can update.

parameters.name: townhallId
parameters.description: The ID of the town hall.

post.description: Publish a draft town hall to make it visible to its audience.

parameters.name: townhallId
parameters.description: The ID of the town hall.

post.description: Cancel a town hall. Sets the town hall's status to canceled permanently.

parameters.name: townhallId
parameters.description: The ID of the town hall.

get.summary: List Town Halls by User Role
get.description: Get town halls where the signed-in user has the specified role (organizer, coOrganizer, presenter, attendee).

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: User role filter (organizer, coOrganizer, presenter, attendee).

get.summary: List Town Halls by User ID and Role
get.description: Get town halls where the specified user has the given role.

parameters.name: fnUserId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to filter by.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: User role filter (organizer, coOrganizer, presenter, attendee).

get.description: Get all session summaries for a webinar.
Read the full properties of a webinar session.
Get all session summaries for a town hall.

parameters.name: townhallId
parameters.description: The ID of the town hall.

get.description: Read the full properties of a town hall session.

parameters.name: townhallId
parameters.description: The ID of the town hall.

get.description: Get all presenters for a webinar.

post.description: Add a new presenter to a webinar.

get.description: Read the properties of a webinar presenter.

patch.description: Update the properties of a webinar presenter.

delete.description: Remove a presenter from a webinar.

get.description: Get all presenters for a town hall.

parameters.name: townhallId
parameters.description: The ID of the town hall.

post.description: Add a new presenter to a town hall.

parameters.name: townhallId
parameters.description: The ID of the town hall.

get.description: Read the properties of a town hall presenter.

parameters.name: townhallId
parameters.description: The ID of the town hall.

patch.description: Update the properties of a town hall presenter.

parameters.name: townhallId
parameters.description: The ID of the town hall.

delete.description: Remove a presenter from a town hall.

parameters.name: townhallId
parameters.description: The ID of the town hall.

get.description: Get all registration records for a webinar.

post.description: Create a registrant's registration record for a webinar.

get.description: Get the properties of a webinar registration record.

parameters.name: registrationId
parameters.description: The ID of the registration record.

post.description: Cancel a registrant's registration for a webinar.

parameters.name: registrationId
parameters.description: The ID of the registration record.

get.description: Get the registration configuration for a webinar, including the registration portal URL and questions.

meetingId.description: Unique identifier of the online meeting

callId.description: Unique identifier for the call related to this transcript

createdDateTime.description: Date and time at which the transcript was created

endDateTime.description: Date and time at which the transcription ended

contentCorrelationId.description: Unique identifier that links the transcript with its corresponding recording

transcriptContentUrl.description: URL to access the transcript content

userIdentityType.description: Type of user identity (aadUser, onPremiseUser, etc.)

@odata.nextLink.description: URL to the next page of results

allowedPresenters.description: Who can present (everyone, organization, roleIsPresenter, organizer)

allowAttendeeToEnableCamera.description: Whether attendees can turn on their camera

allowAttendeeToEnableMic.description: Whether attendees can turn on their microphone

content.description: HTML content for the join information

autoAdmittedUsers.description: Who is automatically admitted (everyone, everyoneInCompany, etc.)

meetingId.description: Unique identifier of the online meeting

callId.description: Unique identifier for the call related to this recording

createdDateTime.description: Date and time at which the recording was created

endDateTime.description: Date and time at which the recording ended

contentCorrelationId.description: Unique identifier that links the recording with its corresponding transcript

recordingContentUrl.description: URL to access the recording content

@odata.nextLink.description: URL to the next page of results

id.description: Unique identifier for the attendance report

meetingStartDateTime.description: UTC time when the meeting started

meetingEndDateTime.description: UTC time when the meeting ended

attendanceRecords.description: List of attendance records (available when using $expand=attendanceRecords)

@odata.nextLink.description: URL to the next page of results

role.description: Role of the attendee (None, Attendee, Presenter, Organizer)

attendanceIntervals.description: List of time periods between joining and leaving

durationInSeconds.description: Duration of this interval in seconds

id.description: Unique identifier for the AI insight

callId.description: Unique identifier for the call during which this insight was generated

contentCorrelationId.description: Correlates the transcript from which the insight was generated

createdDateTime.description: Date and time the insight was created

endDateTime.description: Date and time the corresponding transcript ended

meetingNotes.description: AI-generated meeting notes with summaries and discussion points

actionItems.description: Action items extracted from the meeting discussion

mentionEvents.description: Events where a participant was mentioned

@odata.nextLink.description: URL to the next page of results

owner.description: The assigned owner of the action item

spokenByDisplayName.description: Name of the speaker who made the mention

startDateTime.description: When the mention occurred in the meeting

lobbyBypassSettings.description: Lobby bypass settings controlling who can enter the meeting directly

scope.description: Type of users who can bypass the lobby (everyone, organization, organizer, organizationAndFederated, unknownFutureValue, invited, organizationExcludingGuests)

isDialInBypassEnabled.description: Whether dial-in callers can bypass the lobby

allowedPresenters.description: Who can present in the meeting (everyone, organization, roleIsPresenter, organizer, unknownFutureValue)

isEntryExitAnnounced.description: Whether to announce when callers join or leave

allowAttendeeToEnableCamera.description: Whether attendees can turn on their camera

allowAttendeeToEnableMic.description: Whether attendees can turn on their microphone

allowTranscription.description: Whether transcription is enabled for the meeting

allowRecording.description: Whether recording is enabled for the meeting

recordAutomatically.description: Whether to record the meeting automatically

participants.description: Meeting participants including organizer and attendees

upn.description: User principal name of the organizer
User principal name of the attendee

role.description: Role of the attendee (attendee, presenter, producer)

externalId.description: External ID for the meeting. A new meeting is created only when no existing meeting has the same externalId.

participants.description: Meeting participants including organizer and attendees

@odata.nextLink.description: URL to the next page of results
URL to the next page of delta results. Use to continue paging.

@odata.deltaLink.description: URL to use for the next delta query. Present when all current changes have been returned.

value.description: List of new or updated transcripts

@odata.nextLink.description: URL to the next page of delta results. Use to continue paging.

@odata.deltaLink.description: URL to use for the next delta query. Present when all current changes have been returned.

value.description: List of new or updated recordings

id.description: Unique identifier of the town hall.

displayName.description: Display name of the town hall.

isInviteOnly.description: Whether the town hall is restricted to invited attendees.

cancelationDateTime.description: Date and time of cancelation, if applicable.

status.description: Registration status: registered, waitlisted, rejected, canceled.

preferredTimezone.description: Preferred time zone of the registrant.

registrationWebUrl.description: Registration portal URL for the webinar.

capacity.description: Maximum capacity for the webinar registration.

displayName.description: Display name of the town hall.

@odata.nextLink.description: URL for the next page of results.
URL for the next page of results.
